description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Golang Lint and Unit Test - collector that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and allows manual triggering. The workflow has two jobs: Lint and Build, both running on ubuntu-20.04. The Lint job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and runs golangci-lint-action on the collector directory. The Build job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and runs make in the collector directory.
